title: Crockpot Sausage Chili
ingredients: 1 15oz can dark kidney beans, drained and rinsed
1 15oz can light red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
1 15oz can black beans, drained and rinsed
2 10oz cans Rotel tomatoes with green chiles, undrained
instructions:
In a large saucepot, over medium high heat, brown the sausage breaking into small pieces as it cooks. Drain.
Spray the crockpot with cooking spray and place all the ingredients (including the sausage) into the crockpot.
Cover and cook on low for 6 hours or high for 3-4 hours.
Serve with shredded cheese, parsley, sour cream and either taco chips or cornbread.
